channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: File of leaves not cleared by council, 4th March
item.description:
File of leaves not cleared by council

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves still on the lawns, 4th March
item.description:
I first reported this problem at the beginning of December 2025 - almost three months ago. It has still not been dealt with. My photo attached was taken this morning. Spring is now here and the rotting leaves are detracting from the enjoyment of all Kelsey Park users, particularly those using the lawns
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelsey Park Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Freezer and Buggy, 4th March
item.description:
The freezer has been there since September 2025. It is fully of rubbish, rotten plants and bugs. A buggy has recently been dumped next to it. Next to Vishnu Convenience Store at the top of Whitworth Road SE18 3QB

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitworth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parked outside on road with no tax or mot for 3 weeks, 4th March
item.description:
Car outside house no tax or mot

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Halfway Street, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Park Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Large chunks of tarmac on the highway, 4th March
item.description:
From nearby eroding pothole. Chunks near speed table. Outside no 21. No 23. No. 20. No. 22.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Irvine Way, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on roundabout with Sundrige Avenue & Elmstead Lane., 4th March
item.description:
Large pothole, which punctured my tyre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sundridge Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes, 4th March

Lots of potholes on sydenham hill near sydenham rise

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sydenham Hill, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 4th March
item.description:
There has been multiple potholes along Parkhouse street but they have significantly got worse in recent weeks. Due to the number and sheer size of the potholes they have the potential to do serious damage as this one way street is used frequently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkhouse Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New tree support removed, 4th March
item.description:
New tree support removed by loading it to the car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Midfield Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped double mattress on Erithbound side of Bronze Age Way., 4th March
item.description:
This is a resubmission of report 8724785. That report stated that the issue had been fixed, which it has not. This is your 2nd attempt.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bronze Age Way, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible medical waste dumped, 4th March
item.description:
On the left hand side of number 2 powster there appears to be a site where someone has dumped waste and medical waste. Possibly someone living rough. front garden has clothing and papers dumped as well

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Powster Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Windmill Hill, 4th March
item.description:
Traffic has been diverted through our tiny road. Cars are racing through and endangering our lives, especially as the pavement is too narrow for more than one person
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Windmill Hill, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on Kent Road boxes and other matter, 4th March
item.description:
Boxes and other matter dumped in Kent Road to the left of house number 25 thx
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Kent Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
